title: Anti-pattern: 硬编码密钥/密码/Token 在源代码中
description: 硬编码密钥/密码/Token 在源代码中
content: {"id": "shadow-003", "pattern": "硬编码密钥/密码/Token 在源代码中", "consequence": "安全泄露，密钥曝光", "severity": "critical", "detection": "代码中包含 api_key = \"...\" 或 password = \"...\"", "prevention": "ALWAYS use environment variables or secret managers", "source": "ECC security.md + MUNDO approval.py"}
